practice_note.title: How to practice why_joins_are_needed.title
practice_note.bodyMarkdown:

module6_why_joins_are_needed_practice_sq.title: Practice: why_joins_are_needed.title
module6_why_joins_are_needed_practice_sq.prompt:
The `products` table already exists.

Write a query that returns the number of rows and the average price.

Then run it.

help.hint_1: COUNT(*) gives the number of rows.

module6_why_joins_are_needed_practice_sq.hint: Use aggregate functions in the SELECT list.
module6_why_joins_are_needed_practice_sq.starterCode:
-- Summarize the table
SELECT COUNT(*) AS product_count, AVG(price) AS avg_price
FROM products
